scripts.dev: concurrently -n "FRONTEND,BACKEND,ML" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix farmer-dashboard" "npm run dev --prefix farmer-dashboard-backend" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix farmer-dashboard && npm run build --prefix farmer-dashboard-backend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix farmer-dashboard && npm install --prefix farmer-dashboard-backend && npm run setup:ml && npm run setup:ml:install
